hero.title: Senior Software Engineer | Scalable Systems | Cloud & Microservices | AI Engineering & Mentoring
about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a Senior Software Engineer with a strong background in scalable architecture, process optimization, and cloud-based system development. I excel at building and scaling platforms from startup to enterprise, ensuring systems are automated, efficient, and easy to manage. My expertise spans backend development with TypeScript, NestJS, Python, and FastAPI, system design with microservices and API-driven architectures, and cloud infrastructure using Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, GCP, and Azure.
about.paragraph2: On the frontend, I deliver modern, responsive, and accessible user experiences using React, Next.js, and advanced UI frameworks—focusing on performance, usability, and seamless integration with backend and AI-powered services. I transform UI/UX designs into pixel-perfect interfaces using TailwindCSS, with a focus on web performance optimization and accessibility standards.
about.paragraph3: I have hands-on experience designing and deploying AI-driven tools, including context-aware systems, prompt engineering, token optimization, and streaming LLM responses. I leverage vector databases (Pinecone, Azure Cognitive Search, Qdrant, FAISS), retrieval-augmented generation, and model finetuning to build intelligent, production-ready solutions. I design secure systems with Azure DevOps, Azure Functions, managed identity, and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Bicep), ensuring compliance with banking-grade security standards and regulatory frameworks.
about.paragraph4: I thrive in high-growth environments, where I not only build reliable software but also improve engineering workflows, mentor teams, and push for best practices. My goal is to create highly scalable, self-managed platforms that reduce operational friction and allow businesses to grow without technical bottlenecks. I have delivered end-to-end solutions from PoC to production in FinTech and InsurTech, handling payments, pricing engines, compliance automation, and third-party integrations.

experience.belfius.title: AI Systems Engineer
experience.belfius.description: At Belfius, I contribute to the design and integration of AI-driven agents and secure reasoning systems within regulated banking environments. My role focuses on end-to-end product delivery, from concept to production, ensuring security, scalability, and compliance across the entire lifecycle.
experience.belfius.achievement1: Developed and integrated autonomous AI agents supporting internal operations and client-facing workflows
experience.belfius.achievement2: Designed LLM orchestration pipelines combining retrieval-augmented generation, hybrid search, and guarded prompting
experience.belfius.achievement3: Implemented Azure-based secure infrastructure with managed identity, data encryption, and zero-trust deployment policies
experience.belfius.achievement4: Built FastAPI microservices interfacing with vector stores and enterprise data, enabling controlled reasoning and secure knowledge access
experience.belfius.achievement5: Collaborated with InfoSec and Architecture teams to align AI systems with bank-grade security standards and regulatory frameworks
experience.belfius.achievement6: Led end-to-end productization of AI prototypes into production-grade, monitored, and versioned services
experience.belfius.achievement7: Contributed to the bank's AI governance, model evaluation, and ethical AI initiatives
